zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern於1083年1月7日出生在德國貝也時，他的父親Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN21歲，母親Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG18歲。他於1116年7月13日之前與Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf在德國貝也結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1156年8月4日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀恩多福享年73歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀恩多福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern于1083年1月7日出生在德国貝也时，他的父亲Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN21岁，母亲Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG18岁。他于1116年7月13日之前与Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf在德国貝也结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1156年8月4日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀恩多福享年73岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安-素爾茲巴賀恩多福。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Scheyern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name for someone from Scheyern, Bavaria.

variants.name: Scheuer
meanings: German: from Middle High German schiur(e), German Scheuer ‘barn, granary’, a topographic name for someone who lived near a conspicuous barn or near a tithe-barn. It is also a metonymic occupational name for an official responsible for receiving the tithes of agricultural produce rendered.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern was born on 7 January 1083, in Bavaria, Germany, his father, Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN, was 21 and his mother, Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG, was 18. He married Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf before 13 July 1116, in Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 August 1156, in Ensdorf, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 73, and was buried in Ensdorf, Amberg-Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern est né le 7 janvier 1083, à Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf avant 13 juillet 1116, à Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 août 1156, à Ensdorf, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Ensdorf, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern am 7. Januar 1083 in Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN 21 und seine Mutter Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG 18. Er hat vor 13. Juli 1116 in Bayern, Deutschland Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1156 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Ensdorf, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Ensdorf, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern è nato il il 7 gennaio 1083 nel Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf prima del 13 luglio 1116, nel Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1156, nel Ensdorf, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Ensdorf, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayernが1083年1月7日にドイツバイエルンで生まれた時，父Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSENは21歳，母Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERGは18歳であった。1116年7月13日以前にドイツバイエルンでHeilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1156年8月4日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンバーグ-スルズバチエンスドルフで73歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンバーグ-スルズバチエンスドルフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern(이)가 1083년 1월 7일 독일 베이른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1116년 7월 13일 이전 독일 베이른에서 Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1156년 8월 4일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치 즈도르프에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 아버그-설즈바치 즈도르프에 묻혔다.

mn.7 January 1083–4 August 1156: 1083 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 7–1156 оны Наймдугаар сарын 4

pt.7 January 1083–4 August 1156: 7 de janeiro de 1083–4 de agosto de 1156
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern nasceu em 7 de janeiro de 1083, em Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf antes 13 de julho de 1116, em Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1156, em Ensdorf, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemanha, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Ensdorf, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern родился 7 января 1083 г. в местности беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf перед 13 июля 1116 г. в местности беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 августа 1156 г. в местности энсдорф, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности энсдорф, ландкрис эмбирг-сулзбач, беиирн, Германия.

es.7 January 1083–4 August 1156: 7 de enero de 1083–4 de agosto de 1156
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto V. von Scheyern Pfalzgraf in Bayern nació el 7 de enero de 1083, en Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Othon II DE WITTELSBACH-DE DIESSEN, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Richarde DE WEIMAR DE RATZHOFEN-DE REIPERSBERG, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Heilika von Lengenfeld-Pettendorf antes de 13 de julio de 1116, en Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1156, en Ensdorf, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Ensdorf, Landkreis Amberg-Sulzbach, Bayern, Alemania.
